commands.name: docs search
commands.description: Searches local API, documentation and examples index.

commands.name: docs type
commands.description: Returns a public API type from the API manifest.

commands.name: docs member
commands.description: Returns a public API member from the API manifest.

apiManifest.contract: Public API metadata generated from compiled assembly, XML documentation and GitHub Wiki compatibility table.

documentation.contract: Current implementation documentation and Agent-native cross-platform 2D game engine architecture notes.

examples.contract: Curated local examples for CLI and AI agents.

sqliteCache.contract: Generated local SQLite search cache; manifest and NDJSON shards remain canonical.
